import{useState,useCallback,useRef}from"react";import{getSongs}from"../services/api-client.js";// ← .js extension required
const PAGE_SIZE=20;export const useSongs=()=>{const[songs,setSongs]=useState([]);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(false);const[error,setError]=useState(null);const[page,setPage]=useState(1);const allResultsRef=useRef([]);const search=useCallback(async term=>{setLoading(true);setError(null);setPage(1);try{const results=await getSongs(term);allResultsRef.current=results;setSongs(results.slice(0,PAGE_SIZE));}catch(err){setError("Failed to load songs. Please try again.");}finally{setLoading(false);}},[]);const loadMore=()=>{const next=page+1;setSongs(allResultsRef.current.slice(0,next*PAGE_SIZE));setPage(next);};const hasMore=songs.length<allResultsRef.current.length;return{songs,loading,error,search,loadMore,hasMore};};
